image.alt: Luxury modern home with pool and landscaped grounds

about.title: Dedicated to Your Real Estate Success
about.lead: I'm Najiba Nateqi, a Licensed REALTOR® with Millennium Realty Group, Inc., proudly serving buyers and sellers throughout Maryland and Virginia.
about.description: My approach is simple: listen first, strategize second, and execute with precision. Whether you're purchasing your first home, selling a cherished property, or building an investment portfolio, I bring deep local market knowledge, sharp negotiation skills, and a client-first mindset to every transaction.
highlights: Deep knowledge of Northern Virginia and Maryland markets
Proven track record in competitive offer situations
Professional service from consultation through closing

whySection.title: The Difference Is in the Details
whySection.subtitle: Real estate is one of life's biggest decisions. You deserve an agent who treats it that way — with expertise, integrity, and unwavering commitment to your best outcome.

testimonials.name: Michael & Sarah Chen
testimonials.quote: Najiba made our home search effortless. Her knowledge of the market and calm professionalism gave us complete confidence from day one.

testimonials.name: David Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: We sold above asking in under two weeks. Her marketing strategy and negotiation skills are truly world-class.

testimonials.name: Jennifer Walsh
testimonials.quote: As a first-time buyer, I felt supported every step of the way. Najiba explained everything clearly and fought hard for us.

contactSection.title: Start Your Journey Today
contactSection.text: Whether you're ready to move or simply exploring your options, I'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form and I'll respond within one business day.
